title: boehmeria rugosissima
intro: Boehmeria rugosissima, also known as Rough/nettleleaf Boehmeria, is a plant species in the Urticaceae family, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Boehmeria rugosissima include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and alleviating joint pain and inflammation. Boehmeria rugosissima can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and in some cultures, it is also used as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
